name: David Chiang
headline: CTO / AI 工具化 / 產品落地
subHeadline: 協助企業判斷 AI 與系統路線是否正確，能做顧問指引，也能直接進場實作。
subHeadlineEn: I help companies validate AI and system direction, challenge weak technical assumptions, and move from strategy into hands-on implementation.
bio: 如果你正要導入 AI、重整資料流程、評估技術團隊提案，或需要有人幫你辨識路徑是否走對，我可以從需求拆解、架構判讀到落地維運一起處理。
企業級電商架構：帶領 70 人研發團隊，為全球最大健康與美容零售商打造具備 ML 能力的 SAP eCommerce 平台。
跨系統 AI 整合：為全球知名消費性電子品牌串接 AI，整合多通路客服、Salesforce、HubSpot、RingCentral 與 RMA 退換貨流程。
媒體科技：主導生成式 AI 虛擬人與高併發社群平台架構優化，適合顧問合作、技術把關或直接進場實作。
[ 合作方式：可正職 / 可兼職 / 專案顧問 ｜不做博弈、加密幣與交易所 ]
→ github 大量個人開源專案 超過 111 組
bioEn: If you are introducing AI, redesigning internal workflows, or need a second opinion on your technical team's proposals, I can help from problem framing and architecture review through delivery and maintenance.
Enterprise e-commerce: led a 70-person engineering organization to build an ML-enabled SAP eCommerce platform for the world's largest health and beauty retailer.
Cross-system AI integration: connected AI into customer service, Salesforce, HubSpot, RingCentral, and RMA workflows for a major global consumer electronics brand.
Media technology: led generative AI virtual human work and high-concurrency social platform optimization, available for advisory, technical review, or hands-on execution.
[ Available for full-time, part-time, or project advisory work. No gambling, crypto, or crypto exchanges. ]
